cache_cluster_enabled.description: Indicates if the cache cluster is enabled for the stage.

cache_cluster_size.description: Specifies the size of the cache cluster for the stage.

client_certificate_id.description: The identifier for the client certificate used by the stage.

deployment_id.description: The deployment identifier associated with the stage.

description.description: A brief description of the stage.

documentation_version.description: The version of the documentation associated with the stage.

rest_api_id.description: The identifier of the REST API that the stage belongs to.

stage_name.description: The name of the stage within the API Gateway.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs for tagging the stage.

variables.description: A map of stage variables that are associated with the stage.

xray_tracing_enabled.description: Indicates if AWS X-Ray tracing is enabled for the stage.

access_log_settings.description: The settings for the access log.

canary_settings.description: The settings for the canary deployment.
canary_settings.type: list(object({ deployment_id: string, percent_traffic: optional(number), stage_variable_overrides: optional(map(string)), use_stage_cache: optional(bool) }))
